input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.2.10 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.2.10
            TITLE: finger guards

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.2.10: Finger Guards
T.5.2.10 Finger Guards  
a. Must cover any drivetrain parts that spin while the vehicle is stationary with the engine 
running.   
b. Must be made of material sufficient to resist finger forces.    
c. Mesh or perforated material may be used but must prevent the passage of a 12 mm 
diameter object through the guard.

final_answer: rule T.5.2.10: Finger Guards T.5.2.10 Finger Guards a. Must cover any drivetrain parts that spin while the vehicle is stationary with the engine running. b. Must be made of material sufficient to resist finger forces. c. Mesh or perforated material may be used but must prevent the passage of a 12 mm diameter object through the guard.
